triggers: DBO_STOP_LOSS: WTI tested $91.11 intraday (stop at WTI ~$95 / DBO ~$18)
T001_THESIS_BREAK: Iran War geopolitical premium removed by US-Iran-Israel ceasefire

trades.reason: T-001 energy/geopolitical thesis BROKEN. Ceasefire removes war premium. Full exit per thesis-invalidation rule.
Stop loss triggered. WTI $91 intraday (stop was ~$95). T-001 also broken. Mechanical exit.
Partial profit-take at gold ATH ($4,803). War-premium sub-thesis partially unwinds. Dollar-weakness sub-thesis supports 15% hold. Reduce 5%.
Cash increase to approach regime playbook 80% target (Transitional/Unclear). Absorbs XLE 12% + DBO 5% + IAU 5% = 22% of proceeds. Final BIL+SHY = 75% cash-equivalent.
Modest add. Defensive quality in transitional regime. Lower oil supports consumer staples margins. T-003 thesis intact.

next_review_trigger: April 10 Islamabad peace talks OR ceasefire collapse
notes: All analyst recommendations accepted by PM. No overrides. The 5% gap vs 80% playbook target is deliberate — IAU's dollar-weakness sub-thesis and XLP's defensive quality justify the slight deviation. If Islamabad talks succeed and ceasefire is extended, re-evaluate adding broad equity exposure (SPY/QQQ or sector ETFs).
